settings.heading: Information we collect
settings.content:
We may collect:

  • Name
  • Phone number
  • Email address
  • Delivery address
  • Order details
  • Payment-related confirmation details
  • Support messages or inquiry details

settings.heading: How we use information
settings.content: Customer information is used to process orders, confirm delivery details, provide customer support, handle returns or complaints, improve website experience and send order or marketing communication where allowed.

settings.heading: Payment privacy
settings.content: Morganics does not ask customers to share sensitive banking passwords or private account credentials.

settings.heading: Data sharing
settings.content: Customer information may be shared with courier/payment partners only where needed to complete order delivery or payment processing.

settings.heading: Marketing communication
settings.content: Customers may receive updates through email, SMS or WhatsApp where permitted. Customers can request to stop promotional communication.

settings.heading: Data protection
settings.content: We aim to keep customer data safe and use it only for legitimate business purposes.

settings.heading: Privacy Policy
settings.intro: Morganics respects customer privacy. This page explains how we collect and use information needed to process orders and support customers.
settings.cta_text: Message us with the product name, desired quantity and your city. Our team will guide you with availability and next steps.
